[parallel] compare the stratocaster and les paul

response.content:
Here's a comparison of the two guitars:

| | Fender Stratocaster | Gibson Les Paul |
|---|---|---|
| Price | $1,299 | $2,499 |

The Stratocaster is $1,200 cheaper and more versatile, while the Les Paul offers a warmer, thicker tone.
